description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot bordered by a tall hedge. The building features a complex, multi-gabled dark roof and white exterior walls, accented with some wooden paneling. The property includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a covered patio area, and a backyard with a swimming pool and a separate gazebo structure. Large windows and glass doors are distributed across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping includes manicured lawns, a few trees, and paved walkways connecting the main house to the outdoor amenities. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, multi-gabled white bungalow with a dark roof, double garage, covered patio, pool, and gazebo, surrounded by hedges and landscaped lawns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, double garage, and a covered patio area with outdoor seating, bordered by hedges.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, large deck, and a separate gazebo, as well as multiple windows and doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden accent panels, additional windows, and the connection between the house and gazebo.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, symmetrical double garage, and a paved driveway with landscaped greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows on all facades
